Onsitego 1 Year Extended Warranty for Non-Digital Products from Rs. 20001-22500 (Email Delivery - No Physical Kit)
from Onsite Electro Services Private Limited
15
₹1,455.00
  • EMAIL DELIVERY ONLY: Download your extended warranty certificate by sharing your device details. The link is available under buyer/seller messages at www.amazon.in/msg and is also sent to your Amazon registered email ID
  • REPAIR OR REPLACEMENT GUARANTEE: We will either repair your device or give a replacement. The replacement device will be provided at the discretion of Onsitego on the basis of the depreciated value of your device
  • HASSLE-FREE SERVICE: ‘No Questions Asked’ Repair Policy | Zero-Paperwork Claims Process | Free Pick & Drop or At-Home Service
  • LIMIT OF LIABILITY: Onsitego liability is limited to the depreciated value of the device as detailed in our T&C document
  • HIGH-QUALITY REPAIRS: Service by Onsitego authorised service engineers with high-quality spare parts every single time.
  • EASY TO REQUEST SERVICE: Download the Onsitego app to raise a repair request within 10 seconds or visit our website. You can also call us or chat with us on 99205 99206
  • COVERAGE: The plan covers all defects & malfunctions under the original manufacturer’s warranty. The plan starts the day after the manufacturer’s warranty ends or on the 366th day from the date of device purchase, whichever is later. It does not cover physical or liquid damage, accessories, preventive maintenance or consumables. It also does not cover parts that are not covered under the standard manufacturer’s warranty
  • ELIGIBILITY: The plan can be purchased only for new devices bought on the Amazon platform and WITHIN 30 days of device purchase or before the expiration of the manufacturer's warranty, whichever occurs first. You can purchase this plan only for devices that have AT LEAST 1 Authorised Service Centre anywhere in India. The sum of the manufacturer’s warranty and extended warranty CANNOT EXCEED 5 YEARS. This plan does not cover products or devices purchased or used for COMMERCIAL purposes

Free Delivery
The product is eligible for Free delivery. Learn more
What is Pay on Delivery (Cash/Card)?
Pay on Delivery (Cash/Card) payment method includes Cash on Delivery (COD) as well as Debit card / Credit card / Net banking payments at your doorstep.

10 days Returnable

Return Reason Return Period Return Policy
Physical Damage,
Defective,
Wrong and Missing Item 		10 days from delivery Full refund and replacement
Any other reason 10 days from delivery Full refund
Know More

Return Instructions

Keep the item in its original condition and packaging along with MRP tag and accessories for a successful pick-up.

About this item

  • SYNCHRONIZED TREMOLO BRIDGE : This Stratocaster features a synchronized tremolo bridge for expressive string-bending effects.
  • SQUIER SINGLE-COIL AND HUMBUCKING PICKUPS : Voiced in-house at Fender, the Squier single-coil neck and middle pickups produce crisp, articulate tone, complimenting the fat, rich sound of the humbucking bridge pickup.
  • SEALED DIE-CAST TUNING MACHINES : Sealed die-cast tuning machines have a smooth action for accurate tuning.
  • Controls: Master Volume, Tone 1. (Neck/Middle Pickups), Tone 2. (Bridge Pickup)
  • Switching: 5-Position Blade: Position 1. Bridge Pickup, Position 2. Bridge and Middle Pickup, Position 3. Middle Pickup, Position 4. Middle and Neck Pickup, Position 5. Neck Pickup
  • Bajaao Standard Electric Guitar Gigbag : Designed above all to protect your instrument, but also to be stylish and durable. Backpack-style straps for easy transport. This economy bag has a durable nylon outer shell and a pocket for safe-keeping of your accessories.
  • Bajaao Microfiber Guitar/Instrument Polishing Cloth : The Bajaao Microfiber Polishing Cloth is made of 80% polyester and 20% nylon. One strand is 10 times finer than silk and 100 times smaller than a human hair. Microfiber is preferred for its very lightweight, super absorbency, and rapid drying properties. The polishing cloth rapidly absorbs up to 7 times its weight in moisture and can be used safely on any surface. Polishes your guitar to a brilliant shine.
  • Bajaao Guitar Shoulder Strap Nylon Brown : BAJAAO 2" Nylon shoulder straps feature easy-adjustment buckles, Comfort-Edge webbing that's easy on the neck and won't deteriorate, and 100% leather ends.
  • Guitar Picks - Set of 6 : These 351-shaped picks are precision cut and expertly tumbled to provide a smooth, rounded edge resistant to chipping. The finishing process assures a virtually slip-proof grip and unmatched durability even after hours of playing!

Product Description

Squier By Fender 6 String Solid-Body Electric Guitar with Gig-Bag, Polishing Cloth, Strap, Picks & E-Book

The Squier Sonic Stratocaster HSS is ready to launch any musical adventure into warp speed, offering iconic Fender style and inspiring tone for players at any stage. This Strat sports a slim and inviting “C”-shaped neck profile and a thin, lightweight body for optimal playing comfort. The HSS pickup configuration denotes a humbucking (H) bridge pickup for substantial, high-output tone, complimenting the single-coil (S) neck and middle pickups that chime with crystal clarity. Further details of this model include a tremolo bridge for expressive vibrato effects, sealed-gear tuning machines for smooth, accurate tuning and durable chrome-plated hardware that is sure to catch the spotlight.

Synchronized Tremolo Bridge

This Stratocaster features a synchronized tremolo bridge for expressive string-bending effects.

Squier Single-Coil & Humbucking Pickup

Voiced in-house at Fender, the Squier single-coil neck and middle pickups produce crisp, articulate tone, complimenting the fat, rich sound of the humbucking bridge pickup.

Sealed Die-Cast Tuning Machines

Sealed die-cast tuning machines have a smooth action for accurate tuning.

Bajaao Standard Gig-Bag

Designed above all to protect your instrument, but also to be stylish and durable. Backpack-style straps for easy transport. This economy bag has a durable nylon outer shell and a pocket for safe-keeping of your accessories.

Bajaao Polishing Cloth & Bajaao Strap

The Bajaao Microfiber Polishing Cloth is made of 80% polyester and 20% nylon. One strand is 10 times finer than silk and 100 times smaller than a human hair. Microfiber is preferred for its very lightweight, super absorbency, and rapid drying properties and Bajaao 2-Inch Nylon Padded Guitar Strap for Electric / Acoustic / Bass Guitar

Nylon Max Grip Guitar Picks

These 351-shaped picks are precision cut and expertly tumbled to provide a smooth, rounded edge resistant to chipping. The finishing process assures a virtually slip-proof grip and unmatched durability even after hours of playing!

Features:

  • Thin and lightweight body
  • Squier humbucking bridge pickup, single-coil neck and middle pickups (HSS)
  • 6-saddle tremolo bridge
  • Sealed-gear tuning machines
  • Chrome hardware

Specifications: Body

  • Body Material: Poplar
  • Body Shape: Stratocaster
  • Body Finish: Gloss Polyurethane

Neck:

  • Neck Material: Maple
  • Neck Finish: Satin Urethane
  • Neck Shape: "C" Shape
  • Scale Length: 25.5" (64.77 cm)
  • Fingerboard Material: Maple
  • Fingerboard Radius: 9.5" (241 mm)
  • Number of Frets: 21
  • Fret Size: Narrow Tall
  • Nut Material: Synthetic Bone
  • Nut Width: 1.650" (42 mm)
  • Position Inlays: Black Dot
  • Truss Rod: Head Adjust
  • Truss Rod Nut: 4 mm Hex

Electronics

  • Bridge Pickup: Ceramic Humbucker
  • Middle Pickup: Ceramic Single-Coil
  • Neck Pickup: Ceramic Single-Coil
  • Controls: Master Volume, Tone 1. (Neck/Middle Pickups), Tone 2. (Bridge Pickup)
  • Switching: 5-Position Blade: Position 1. Bridge Pickup, Position 2. Bridge and Middle Pickup, Position 3. Middle Pickup, Position 4. Middle and Neck Pickup, Position 5. Neck Pickup
  • Configuration: HSS

Hardware

  • Bridge: 6-Saddle Vintage-Style Synchronized Tremolo with Block Saddles
  • Hardware Finish: Chrome
  • Tuning Machines: Die-Cast Sealed
  • Pickguard: 1-Ply White / 1-Ply Black
  • Control Knobs: White Plastic
  • Switch Tip: White
  • Neck Plate: 4-Bolt Squier

Miscellaneous

  • Strings: Nickel Plated Steel (.009-.042 Gauges)

How are ratings calculated?
To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

4 out of 5 stars
Squier Guitar HSS pickup
Open box, Repackaged. Multiple transperent tape sticks. Pick up assembly plate edges and vol, tone Knob top corner black dirty. Cleaning not possible. Strumming scratches visible. All accessories available. Sound quality is good. Bright tone strings. I returned it.

    3.0 out of 5 stars Few scratches but a really cool guitar
    Reviewed in India on 27 February 2026
    Size: HSS Pickup (Stratocaster)Colour: Tahitian CoralVerified Purchase
    The product had scratches on the back part and the strings had a bit of rust. I have no major complaints but deducting 2 stars because it should have arrived in pristine condition. The guitar plays really well, plug with a good beginner amp and you have got a really good practice guitar. I love the Tahitian Coral color. I did not return the product and kept it as is, but if you want to go for this guitar, go ask your local guitar shop or try to look up your guitar on bajaoo.com

  • Ajo z.
    3.0 out of 5 stars Fender squier sonic from seller Bajaao
    Reviewed in India on 27 March 2024
    Size: HSS Pickup (Stratocaster)Colour: BlackVerified Purchase
    Guitar with gig bag, cloth, picks and strap was a good combo. But if you need smooth finish overall strat fender, i would suggest you to choose fender affinity series.
    The head machine isn't stable for band practices.
    The fret finishes was not smooth and doesn't look good for long periods, which is a big thumb down from me.
    If you have good amps specially for electric guitar, it will sound amazing else it's a staock pickup and nothing surprise here. Upgrading the pickup will cost the same amount or more as the guitar itself, so i would be very happy if Fender would produce a pick-up(value for money) halve the price for the squier sonic both strat and tele series.
    Expecting better finish in the future.
    Read more
    Ajo z.
    3.0 out of 5 stars
    Fender squier sonic from seller Bajaao

    Reviewed in India on 27 March 2024
    Guitar with gig bag, cloth, picks and strap was a good combo. But if you need smooth finish overall strat fender, i would suggest you to choose fender affinity series.
    The head machine isn't stable for band practices.
    The fret finishes was not smooth and doesn't look good for long periods, which is a big thumb down from me.
    If you have good amps specially for electric guitar, it will sound amazing else it's a staock pickup and nothing surprise here. Upgrading the pickup will cost the same amount or more as the guitar itself, so i would be very happy if Fender would produce a pick-up(value for money) halve the price for the squier sonic both strat and tele series.
    Expecting better finish in the future.

About this Item

  • SYNCHRONIZED TREMOLO BRIDGE : This Stratocaster features a synchronized tremolo bridge for expressive string-bending effects.
  • SQUIER SINGLE-COIL AND HUMBUCKING PICKUPS : Voiced in-house at Fender, the Squier single-coil neck and middle pickups produce crisp, articulate tone, complimenting the fat, rich sound of the humbucking bridge pickup.
  • SEALED DIE-CAST TUNING MACHINES : Sealed die-cast tuning machines have a smooth action for accurate tuning.
  • Controls: Master Volume, Tone 1. (Neck/Middle Pickups), Tone 2. (Bridge Pickup)
  • Switching: 5-Position Blade: Position 1. Bridge Pickup, Position 2. Bridge and Middle Pickup, Position 3. Middle Pickup, Position 4. Middle and Neck Pickup, Position 5. Neck Pickup
  • Bajaao Standard Electric Guitar Gigbag : Designed above all to protect your instrument, but also to be stylish and durable. Backpack-style straps for easy transport. This economy bag has a durable nylon outer shell and a pocket for safe-keeping of your accessories.
  • Bajaao Microfiber Guitar/Instrument Polishing Cloth : The Bajaao Microfiber Polishing Cloth is made of 80% polyester and 20% nylon. One strand is 10 times finer than silk and 100 times smaller than a human hair. Microfiber is preferred for its very lightweight, super absorbency, and rapid drying properties. The polishing cloth rapidly absorbs up to 7 times its weight in moisture and can be used safely on any surface. Polishes your guitar to a brilliant shine.
  • Bajaao Guitar Shoulder Strap Nylon Brown : BAJAAO 2" Nylon shoulder straps feature easy-adjustment buckles, Comfort-Edge webbing that's easy on the neck and won't deteriorate, and 100% leather ends.
  • Guitar Picks - Set of 6 : These 351-shaped picks are precision cut and expertly tumbled to provide a smooth, rounded edge resistant to chipping. The finishing process assures a virtually slip-proof grip and unmatched durability even after hours of playing!

Product description

The Squier Sonic Stratocaster HSS is ready to launch any musical adventure into warp speed, offering iconic Fender style and inspiring tone for players at any stage. This Strat sports a slim and inviting "C"-shaped neck profile and a thin, lightweight body for optimal playing comfort. The HSS pickup configuration denotes a humbucking (H) bridge pickup for substantial, high-output tone, complimenting the single-coil (S) neck and middle pickups that chime with crystal clarity. Further details of this model include a tremolo bridge for expressive vibrato effects, sealed-gear tuning machines for smooth, accurate tuning and durable chrome-plated hardware that is sure to catch the spotlight.
